## What's Changed

### New Features

- **Quick Search (⌘K)**: Press ⌘K to quickly search and jump to any settings page.
- **Refreshed Light Theme**: A brighter "snow" light palette with crisper neutrals and a more vivid brand accent.
- **Redesigned Quick-Action Button**: The floating toolbar is now a tidy speed-dial for quick actions.

### Improvements

- Redesigned the sidebar's top area with a unified collapse control.
- Cleaner, more consistent firewall zone and interface badges.
- More readable tables on mobile.
- Smoother mega-menu animations, with more section icons.
- Links now use the theme's brand color.
- Uniform form field widths for a tidier layout.
- Better compatibility with third-party LuCI apps, including a ModemData layout patch contributed by @cjayacopra.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed the mobile navigation drawer leaving a ghosting effect when navigating.
- Fixed tooltip and mobile card field layout glitches.
- Fixed rounded corners on table headers.

### Other Changes

- For remaining changes, see the [full changelog](https://github.com/eamonxg/luci-theme-aurora/compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0)
